Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2026

This privacy policy applies to the Resume Builder – Create CV PDF app.

Information Collection

This app does not collect, store, or share any personal information.

Local Data

All resume information entered in the app stays only on the user's device.

Third-Party Services

This app does not use third-party analytics or advertising services.

Contact

If you have any questions, contact: k19112177@gmail.com
